Lisbon, July 6 - 10, 2026

11th IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy

   Register Now

Since 1980, the IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy has been the premier forum for presenting developments in computer security and electronic privacy, and for bringing together researchers and practitioners in the field. Following this story of success, IEEE initiated the European Symposium on Security and Privacy (EuroS&P), which is organized every year in a European city.

Last Updates


May 2026: Poster submission deadline extended — The poster abstract submission deadline has been extended by two weeks to May 22, 2026 (Friday), Anywhere on Earth. Details are in the Call for Posters.

March 2026: Registration is now open! - Register now for EuroS&P 2026. Early bird registration available until May 31, 2026.

March 2026: Accommodation and Dining information updated - check out our recommendations for hotels and restaurants in Lisbon.

March 2026: Announcing keynote speakers: Srini Devadas and Sofía Celi.

October 2025: Submissions are open - submit via HotCRP.

October 2025: Program Committee announced - see the Program Committee.

October 2025: Added area chairs

September 2025: Call for Papers Published: The CFP for EuroS&P 2026 is now available.

July 2025: PC Nomination Form Now Available: We are now accepting self-nominations and nominations for Program Committee members.

May 2025: Website is now online: The EuroS&P 2026 website is up and running. Stay tuned for updates about the conference.

Important Dates

All deadlines are Anywhere on Earth (AoE = UTC-12h).

Research Papers Registration deadline 13 November 2025 (Thursday) 
Submission deadline 20 November 2025 (Thursday) 
Early rejection notification 16 January 2026 (Friday)
Rebuttal period 11 February - 16 February 2026 (Wednesday to Monday)
Author notification 5 March 2026 (Thursday)
Camera-ready deadline 23 April 2026 (Thursday)
Conference Lisbon, Portugal 6 - 10 July 2026 (Monday to Friday)
